title: Cube Chaos
description: Brings a nice Comic feeling to Minecraft
body:
[CubeChaos.net](https://cubechaos.net 'https://cubechaos.net') **|** [Mr3DAlien.net](http://mr3dalien.net 'http://mr3dalien.net') **|** [Discord](http://discord.mr3dalien.net 'http://discord.mr3dalien.net') **|** [Partners](https://linktr.ee/AlienPartners 'https://linktr.ee/AlienPartners')
## Description
Bringing a nice comic look with some sweet mobs and blocks that you just want to hug, this pack takes Minecraft to a whole new level.

- 16x16 resolution
- Comic oriented look
- Every block is made of randomly selected cubes
- Uses the default color palette for that familiar feeling we all know and love
- By [Mr3DAlien](https://modrinth.com/user/Mr3DAlien 'https://modrinth.com/user/Mr3DAlien')
